name: check_availability
description: Check room availability for a hotel on specific dates. Use this to see what room types are available and their pricing before making a reservation.

package_type.description: Package type: 'simple' for basic pricing or 'detailed' for comprehensive breakdown

name: generate_quote
description: Generate a detailed pricing quote for a specific room type and dates. Use this after checking availability to get exact pricing details.

room_type_id.description: Unique identifier for the room type

package_type.description: Package type: 'simple' for basic pricing or 'detailed' for comprehensive breakdown

name: create_reservation
description: Create a new hotel reservation. Use this after checking availability and generating a quote to book a room.

room_type_id.description: Unique identifier for the room type to reserve

guest_name.description: Full name of the primary guest

package_type.description: Package type: 'simple' for basic pricing or 'detailed' for comprehensive breakdown

name: get_reservations
description: Retrieve reservations by hotel or guest email. Use this to look up existing bookings.

hotel_id.description: Unique identifier for the hotel (use this OR guest_email, not both)

guest_email.description: Email address of the guest (use this OR hotel_id, not both)

limit.description: Maximum number of reservations to return

name: get_reservation
description: Get details of a specific reservation by its ID. Use this to look up a particular booking.

name: update_reservation
description: Update an existing reservation. Use this to modify guest details, dates, or reservation status.

check_in_date.description: Updated check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format

check_out_date.description: Updated check-out date in YYYY-MM-DD format

name: checkout_guest
description: Process guest checkout and final billing. Use this when a guest is leaving the hotel.

additional_charges.description: Additional charges to add to the bill (e.g., room service, minibar)

name: create_housekeeping_request
description: Create a housekeeping or maintenance request for a hotel room. Use this when guests need room service or report issues.

room_number.description: Room number where service is needed

guest_name.description: Name of the guest making the request

name: get_hotels
description: Get a list of all available hotels with their basic information. Use this to discover hotel options and get hotel IDs for other operations.

limit.description: Maximum number of hotels to return (optional)

name: query_hotel_knowledge
description: Query the hotel knowledge base for information specific to a single hotel. Use this to get detailed information about rooms, amenities, policies, dining, and other hotel-specific details. Always specify a hotel_id to filter results to that specific property.

query.description: The search query text to find relevant hotel information

hotel_id.description: Unique identifier for the hotel to search within (e.g., 'H-PVR-002' for Paraíso Vallarta, 'H-PTL-003' for Paraíso Tulum, 'H-PLC-004' for Paraíso Los Cabos, 'H-GPR-001' for Grand Paraíso Resort & Spa)

name: query_multi_hotel_knowledge
description: Query the hotel knowledge base across multiple hotels or all hotels in the chain. Use this to compare information between hotels, find common amenities, or search across all properties when the guest hasn't specified a particular hotel. Optionally filter by specific hotel IDs.

query.description: The search query text to find relevant hotel information across multiple properties

hotel_ids.description: Optional array of hotel IDs to filter results. If not provided or empty, searches across all hotels. Valid hotel IDs: 'H-PVR-002' (Paraíso Vallarta), 'H-PTL-003' (Paraíso Tulum), 'H-PLC-004' (Paraíso Los Cabos), 'H-GPR-001' (Grand Paraíso Resort & Spa)
